about.title: About
about.description: My journey as a developer and entrepreneur
about.body: As a developer and entrepreneur, I solve problems with technology. I build projects like Soursea and Don't Touch — each born from a real problem I faced — and share what I learn through this blog.

play.title: Explore
play.description: Explore my portfolio like a game
play.controls: Arrow keys to move, Space to interact

npc.welcome: Hey! This is my workshop. Feel free to look around!

npc.library: Welcome to the library! Click on books to read blog posts.
